title: Microsoft 365 Copilot Interaction
description: Schema representing an interaction between a user and Microsoft 365 Copilot, including prompts, responses, attachments, contexts, links, and mentions. Based on the microsoft.graph.aiInteraction resource type from the Microsoft Graph Copilot namespace.

id.description: The unique identifier for the interaction message.

appClass.description: The data source for Copilot data. Indicates which Microsoft 365 application hosted the interaction. Examples include IPM.SkypeTeams.Message.Copilot.Excel, IPM.SkypeTeams.Message.Copilot.Loop, IPM.SkypeTeams.Message.Copilot.Word, IPM.SkypeTeams.Message.Copilot.PowerPoint, IPM.SkypeTeams.Message.Copilot.Teams.

body.description: The body of the message, including the text content and its body type.

interactionType.description: Indicates whether the interaction is a user prompt or a Copilot response. userPrompt represents a user's input; aiResponse represents Copilot's reply.

conversationType.description: The type of the conversation. Common values include appchat (in-app Copilot interactions) and bizchat (Business Chat / Microsoft 365 Chat interactions).

requestId.description: The identifier that groups a user prompt with its corresponding Copilot response. Both the prompt and response in a single exchange share the same requestId.

sessionId.description: The thread ID or conversation identifier that maps to all Copilot sessions for the user. Groups all interactions within a single conversation session.

createdDateTime.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the interaction was created.

etag.description: The timestamp of when the interaction was last modified. Used for concurrency control.

locale.description: The locale of the sender, in BCP 47 language tag format.

from.description: The user, application, or device that is associated with this interaction.

attachments.description: The collection of documents attached to the interaction, such as cards and images.

contexts.description: The identifiers that map to all contexts associated with the interaction, such as the file or application in which the interaction occurred.

links.description: The collection of links that appear in the interaction, including citation links and reference links.

mentions.description: The collection of entities that were mentioned in the interaction, including users, bots, and other entities.

itemBody.title: Item Body
itemBody.description: The body of a message, including the text of the body and its content type.

contentType.description: The type of the content. Values include text for plain text content and html for HTML-formatted content.

content.description: The content of the body. For userPrompt interactions, this contains the user's question or instruction. For aiResponse interactions, this contains Copilot's generated answer.

identitySet.title: Identity Set
identitySet.description: Represents the user, application, or device associated with the interaction. At least one identity property is typically present.

user.description: The user identity associated with the interaction.

application.description: The application identity associated with the interaction.

device.description: The device identity associated with the interaction.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Represents an identity of a user, application, or device.

id.description: The unique identifier of the identity.

displayName.description: The display name of the identity.

aiInteractionAttachment.title: AI Interaction Attachment
aiInteractionAttachment.description: Represents a message attachment such as cards, images, or file references within a Copilot interaction.

attachmentId.description: The identifier for the attachment. This identifier is only unique within the message scope.

content.description: The content of the attachment, which may be structured content such as an Adaptive Card JSON payload.

contentType.description: The type of the content. Common values include reference, file, and image types such as image/png.

contentUrl.description: The URL of the content, pointing to the location of the attached resource.

name.description: The display name of the attachment.

aiInteractionContext.title: AI Interaction Context
aiInteractionContext.description: Represents a context associated with a Copilot interaction, identifying the file or resource where the interaction occurred.

contextReference.description: The full file URL where the interaction happened.

contextType.description: The type of the file or resource providing context.

displayName.description: The human-readable name of the file or resource.

aiInteractionLink.title: AI Interaction Link
aiInteractionLink.description: Represents a link that appears in a Copilot interaction, such as citation links or reference links in responses.

displayName.description: The display name of the link.

linkType.description: The type of link, providing information about a link in an app chat or Business Chat (BizChat) interaction.

aiInteractionMention.title: AI Interaction Mention
aiInteractionMention.description: Represents a mention of an entity (user, bot, or other entity) within a Copilot interaction.

mentioned.description: The entity mentioned in the message.

mentionId.description: The numeric identifier for the mention within the interaction.

mentionText.description: The text representation of the mention as it appears in the message body.

aiInteractionMentionedIdentitySet.title: AI Interaction Mentioned Identity Set
aiInteractionMentionedIdentitySet.description: Represents the identity of an entity mentioned in a Copilot interaction.

body.content: Here is a summary of the document: The Q4 report outlines revenue growth of 15% year-over-year, driven primarily by the enterprise segment. Key highlights include expansion into three new markets and a 20% increase in customer retention.
